Low-power watch face implementation and header for time and battery status on Pebble devices.


## Files
- **[low_power_face.c](low_power_face.c.md)**: Implements a low-power watch face for Pebble devices, displaying time and battery status.
- **[low_power_face.h](low_power_face.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving application information for the low power face in Pebble firmware.
